name: Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until slightly thickened.
2. Gradually add sugar and a pinch of salt.
3. Scald whole milk cream and pour slowly into the egg mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Add vanilla extract and pour into baking dishes.
5. Set the dishes in a pan with at least 1 inch of water and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Test with a clean knife. Can be prepared up to one day ahead.
7. Sprinkle the top with sugar and/or top with fresh sliced peaches or strawberries.
